title: Hopium Diaries - Dystopian Dreams
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual pattern of flash loan followed by large donation
summary: The attacker used a flash loan to siphon funds from the lending protocol and then donated them to reserves, draining the protocol. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
